we're adding multi-language support (en, es, fr, de). what are the edge cases and scenarios I should test? give me a structured plan I can share with the team
prepare testing checklist for the file upload feature. supports jpg/png/pdf up to 10MB, drag and drop, progress indicator, error handling for unsupported formats
what are the edge cases for our date picker component? it supports date ranges, min/max dates, disabled dates, and timezone-aware selection. write it up as test cases

run ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest and fix any failures
can you run npm test and tell me what's failing? I think the cart tests are broken after my refactor
review the PR at #42 — check the code quality and leave comments on anything that needs fixing

do a pre-release exploratory QA sweep of the whole app, try to break things. iOS sim is up
